2626.reason: [The condition uses &&, which may cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+2 exceeds the token list size. Additionally, the logic is flawed: it should check if the current token is not MAINTK and the next token is not LPARENT to identify function definitions, but the condition incorrectly checks index+1 and index+2 without considering the current index position.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition uses &&, which may cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+2 exceeds the token list size. Additionally, the logic is flawed: it should check if the current token is not MAINTK and the next token is not LPARENT to identify function definitions, but the condition incorrectly checks index+1 and index+2 without considering the current index position.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition uses &&, which may cause an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when index+1 or index+2 is out of bounds. Additionally, the logic is incorrect: it should check for Decl (const, int, char) rather than peeking ahead for main and '(']
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException if index+1 or index+2 exceeds token list bounds; lookahead logic is also flawed for correctly detecting MainFuncDef.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.1 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead without bounds checking, causes IndexOutOfBoundsException when reaching the end of tokens or MainFuncDef.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition for detecting main function; should check current token sequence "int main()" rather than looking ahead arbitrarily, and lacks bounds checking for token list size]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is incorrect and can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. It tries to peek ahead without checking bounds, and the logic for detecting MainFuncDef (which starts with 'int' 'main') is flawed since it only checks for MAINTK at index+1 without verifying the preceding INTTK token.]

2630.reason: [Similar issue: accessing index+1 without checking bounds may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, the loop condition does not properly detect the end of function definitions before main.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Similar issue: accessing index+1 without checking bounds may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. Also, the loop condition does not properly detect the end of function definitions before main.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: potential ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException and incorrect condition for detecting FuncDef]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException if index+1 exceeds token list bounds.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.1 , reason:  Unsafe lookahead without bounds checking, causes IndexOutOfBoundsException.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect condition for stopping function definitions; doesn't properly identify the start of MainFuncDef which begins with "int" not "main", and lacks bounds checking]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: unsafe index access and incorrect detection logic for MainFuncDef. Should check current token sequence properly instead of peeking ahead arbitrarily.]
